titles.title: 青のオーケストラ Season2

data.title: Ao no Orchestra Season 2
data.title_japanese: 青のオーケストラ Season2
data.synopsis:
Following the regular summer concert and retirement of the third-year members, Umimaku High School's Orchestra Club shifts its efforts to the upcoming national competition with a refreshed line-up focusing on the second-year members.

Amidst the cacophony produced by the inconsistent motivation levels and understanding of their repertoire, the orchestra club members struggle to achieve their ideal sound...

data.synopsis:
Frieren loves collecting peculiar spells, and her ever-growing arsenal of magic contains the perfect spells for many occasions. Whether it be by stealthily removing alcohol from Heiter's drinks or by remedying her own sleep issues, Frieren is sure to brighten her companions' days with her magic.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: ドラゴンボール ダイマ

data.title: Dragon Ball Daima
data.title_japanese: ドラゴンボール ダイマ
data.synopsis:
After saving the world from the destructive might of Majin Buu, Gokuu Son and his allies look forward to a well-earned rest. However, unbeknownst to them, their battle was recorded and observed by Gomah, an evil being who assumes the title of King in the Demon Realm, filling the void left behind with the death of former ruler Dabura.

At Gomah's side is Degesu, the younger brother of Higashi no Kaioshin, a being who lords over the universe. Jealous of his brother's power, Degesu works alongside Gomah to steal Earth's Dragon Balls and preemptively subdue any potential future enemies. Calling upon the power of the legendary dragon Shenron, Gomah wishes for Gokuu and his friends to be reverted into children, intending to rob them of the limitless power that defeated Buu. With Earth's greatest warriors shrunken down, Gomah abducts Dende, the planet's acting god.

But Gokuu refuses to be set back by his new body, working to master his younger form to fight as proficiently as he could as an adult. Joined by Kaioshin and Glorio—a mysterious but seemingly rebellious demon—Gokuu pursues Gomah to the Demon Realm in order to rescue Dende and restore his friends to their natural ages.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Project VOLTAGE - Pokemon feat. Hatsune Miku

data.title: Project Voltage
title_synonyms: Project VOLTAGE - Pokemon feat. Hatsune Miku
data.synopsis: A music and art collaboration project between Pokemon and Hatsune Miku. The art part of the collaboration tasked six artists to answer a simple question: What if Hatsune Miku was a XX-type Pokemon Trainer?

data.title: In:App
data.synopsis:
Inside our small smart device is a world very much like our own, where countless Appmen work to run their apps as smoothly as possible. Each of our thoughtless taps or pretty selfies can easily drive Smart World into chaos. But the same goes the other way – when our smartphone malfunctions our days can easily be ruined. 

In this oddly balanced back and forth – where what seems small in one world can become huge in the other – are our protagonists Jackie and Robin. These two don’t quite mesh. They are a team with no teamwork. They just don’t seem reliable enough for us to entrust our smart devices. But they do remind us that their, and our "Smart Life" can easily become comedy.

(Source: WelCon)
